# dotfiles

Personal dotfiles powered by [chezmoi](https://www.chezmoi.io/).

## Quick Start

```bash
sh -c "$(curl -fsLS get.chezmoi.io)" -- init --apply iomz
```

Use `TINY_CHEZMOI=1` for a smaller shell setup.

- [Installation](docs/install.md)

- [Codex](docs/codex.md)
- [Zsh](docs/zsh.md)
- [Neovim](docs/nvim.md)
- [Ansible](docs/ansible.md)
